text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O's debut, her first<n>opportunity to put
her running on<n>display, has arrived.

It's finally debut time... I hope<n>everything will be
okay...

It should so long as it goes well at the<n>start... But...
But, still... Ohhh...
choice_data_list: Opera O? Trying on a new look?

text_block_list.text: Hyeeek! I'm so sorry... But I'm not<n>Opera O.

My name's Meisho Doto... I'm... one<n>of her
friends...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She might not see me as a friend, but<n>I still came...
to, well, to cheer her on...
choice_data_list: Do you know where she is?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Umm, well... I don't think she's here<n>yet. That's
why I'm worried.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It seems she's late on her first day...<n>Really late.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Trainer. Waiting for me? I<n>am positive
you were.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have purposefully made you wait,<n>you see.
Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: How could there be? I planned this<n>late arrival.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As the star, how rude would it be to<n>rob the
supporting cast of their due<n>attention by taking the
stage first?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She knows she's done something<n>wrong...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, my debut race! The day has<n>finally come to
reveal my beauty and<n>stride to the masses!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But a debut is not all that I shall be<n>making!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A legend... A following... And love!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Love... You're amazing, Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Some people are swayed by<n>confidence alone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let us depart, Trainer! The era is<n>waiting for its
new shining star.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do not fret about the outcome. Begin<n>preparations
for the post-race press<n>conference straight away.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There must be enough seating to<n>accommodate all
the flocking media<n>reporters! Haaah ha ha ha!
